1099-g:box1.label: Unemployment compensation
1099-g:box1.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta shaqo-la'aanta ee dawladdu kuu siisay sanadkan markaad shaqo waayday.
1099-g:box1.en: This is the total unemployment benefits the government paid you this year while you were out of work.

1099-g:box2.label: State tax refund, credit, or offset
1099-g:box2.so: Tani waa lacagtii gobolku kuu celiyay ama kuugu daray sannadkii hore, ka dib markii canshuurtaadii gobolka la xisaabiyay.
1099-g:box2.en: This is a state tax refund, credit, or offset you received last year, after your state taxes were calculated.

1099-g:box4.label: Federal income tax withheld
1099-g:box4.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta federaalka ah ee horay laga jaray lacagtan, oo dawladda federaalka loo diray.
1099-g:box4.en: This is the federal tax that was already taken out of this payment and sent to the government.

1099-g:box5.label: RTAA payments
1099-g:box5.so: Tani waa lacag caawimaad oo dawladdu ku siisay shaqaalaha shaqadooda lumiyay sababtoo ah ganacsiga dibadda.
1099-g:box5.en: This is a trade-adjustment assistance payment for workers who lost jobs due to foreign trade.

1099-g:box6.label: Taxable grants
1099-g:box6.so: Tani waa deeq lacag ah oo dawladdu ku siisay oo la canshuuro.
1099-g:box6.en: This is a government grant payment that is taxable income.

1099-g:box7.label: Agriculture payments
1099-g:box7.so: Tani waa lacag dawladdu ku siisay beeraley.
1099-g:box7.en: This is a payment the government made to a farmer or agricultural business.

1099-g:box9.label: Market gain
1099-g:box9.so: Tani waa faa'iido laga helay deyn beereed marka la bixiyo.
1099-g:box9.en: This is a market gain from repaying a commodity credit loan.

1099-g:box10.label: State & state ID number
1099-g:box10.so: Tani waa gobolka iyo lambarka diiwaangashan ee xafiiska kuu bixiyay lacagta.
1099-g:box10.en: This is the state and the state ID number of the agency that paid you.

1099-g:box11.label: State income tax withheld
1099-g:box11.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta gobolka ah ee horay laga jaray lacagtan, oo gobolka loo diray.
1099-g:box11.en: This is the state tax that was already taken out of this payment and sent to your state.
